ddls:
CREATE TABLE "papers" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each paper */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the paper */,
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the discipline of the paper */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the paper */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the paper was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the paper (e.g., submitted, under review, published) */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary author of the paper */,
  "publication_format" TEXT /* Type of publication (e.g., journal, conference proceedings) */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the paper was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the paper */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the paper for search functionality */,
  "plagiarism_score" REAL /* Score from plagiarism detection tools */,
  "copyright_status" TEXT /* Status of copyright agreements (e.g., pending, approved) */,
  "revision_history" TEXT /* Detailed history of revisions for the paper */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_papers_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_papers_discipline_id FOREIGN KEY ("discipline_id") REFERENCES disciplines ("discipline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution to which the author is affiliated */,
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the discipline of the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the author */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the author */,
  "h_index" INTEGER /* H-index of the author */,
  "scopus_id" TEXT /* Scopus identifier for the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authors_discipline_id FOREIGN KEY ("discipline_id") REFERENCES disciplines ("discipline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disciplines" (
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discipline */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the discipline (e.g., Mathematics, Physics) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the discipline */,
  "parent_discipline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent discipline for hierarchical categorization */,
  "research_trends" TEXT /* Current research trends in the discipline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discipline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer assigned to the paper */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was completed */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the reviewer */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation made by the reviewer (e.g., accept, revise, reject) */,
  "review_rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating given by the reviewer (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "plagiarism_check" INTEGER /* Indicates if plagiarism check was performed */,
  "plagiarism_report" TEXT /* Detailed report from plagiarism detection tools */,
  "conflict_of_interest" INTEGER /* Indicates if there is a conflict of interest */,
  "reviewer_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution to which the reviewer is affiliated */,
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the discipline of the reviewer */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_type" TEXT /* Type of reviewer (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews performed by the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_score" REAL /* Average score given by authors for the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviewers_discipline_id FOREIGN KEY ("discipline_id") REFERENCES disciplines ("discipline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., submitted, under review, published) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the status means */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color code for the status (e.g., green for published, red for rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper that cites another paper */,
  "cited_paper_title" TEXT /* Title of the cited paper */,
  "cited_author" TEXT /* Author of the cited paper */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date of the citation */,
  "citation_type" TEXT /* Type of citation (e.g., in-text, footnote) */,
  "citation_source" TEXT /* Source of the citation (e.g., journal, conference) */,
  "citation_impact" REAL /* Impact factor of the cited paper */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the conference is held */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the conference */,
  "conference_type" TEXT /* Type of conference (e.g., international, national) */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the organizing institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the conference website */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Theme of the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "papers_conferences" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper presented at a conference */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference where the paper was presented */,
  "presentation_date" TEXT /* Date the paper was presented at the conference */,
  "presentation_type" TEXT /* Type of presentation (e.g., oral, poster) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_papers_conferences_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_papers_conferences_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper to which the file is associated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the uploaded file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the uploaded file (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the uploaded file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the uploaded file in bytes */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for file integrity verification */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the uploaded file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uploads_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., author, reviewer, editor, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string defining the permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
